title: zanthoxylum apiculatum
intro: Zanthoxylum apiculatum, also known as Korean prickly ash, is a type of flowering plant in the rue family, Rutaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum apiculatum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
